callRecords.fullTranscript: Thank you for calling Our Clinic. [1] For appointments press one. Hi, I need to schedule a cardiology follow-up. [2] Sure, I can help with heart and cardio visits. We have Monday at nine AM with Dr Chen or Wednesday at two thirty with Dr Lee. Monday at nine works. Great, you're booked for cardiology follow-up at Our Clinic. You'll receive a confirmation text.

callRecords.fullTranscript: Our Clinic, how may I help you? I'd like to see a general doctor for a check-up. [1] Internal medicine, new patient consult. Dr Patel has eleven AM Monday or three PM Tuesday. Tuesday three PM please. Booked — general visit with Dr Robert Kim, Tuesday three thirty PM at Our Clinic.

callRecords.transcriptExcerpt: Thank you for calling Our Clinic. I need to cancel my appointment on Wednesday. Can I have your name? Maria Santos. I see your cardiology visit with Dr Chen at ten AM. Yes, please cancel. Done — your slot is released. Would you like to reschedule?
callRecords.fullTranscript: Thank you for calling Our Clinic. I need to cancel my appointment on Wednesday. Can I have your name? Maria Santos. I see your cardiology visit with Dr Chen at ten AM. Yes, please cancel. Done — your slot is released. Would you like to reschedule?

callRecords.transcriptExcerpt: Our Clinic scheduling. [2] Reschedule my general doctor appointment from Monday to Tuesday. Dr Patel has three thirty PM Tuesday open. Perfect. Your general visit is moved to Tuesday three thirty PM.
callRecords.fullTranscript: Our Clinic scheduling. [2] Reschedule my general doctor appointment from Monday to Tuesday. Dr Patel has three thirty PM Tuesday open. Perfect. Your general visit is moved to Tuesday three thirty PM.

callRecords.transcriptExcerpt: Welcome to Our Clinic. [3] For dermatology and skin care press three. [3] You selected skin care. No dermatology slots are available this month. Would you like to join the waitlist or try general medicine? I'll call back later. Thank you.
